gigapan.description:
>>Karin Frank is able to sculpt feelings. Fellsteiger 1 ("the furclimber", the word being
derived from "mountain climbing") is one of her great works related to phenomenological
philosophy. It is trying to establish an intersubjective expression, showing deep emotions
in form of a woodcarved sculpture.<<

During the opening for Von Robotern, die Bilder bauen at Galerie Lisi Hämmerle. Part of Vienna Art Week 2011. http://viennaartweek.com/2011/events/100/%C2%BBvon-robotern-die-bilder-bauen%C2%AB/
